rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal; energy price uncertainty from Iran deal continues at background level, and no Iberian or EU-specific developments emerged.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran deal Sunday signing; Israel strikes Beirut
top_events.summary: Ongoing Middle East uncertainty keeps EU energy prices slightly elevated, with indirect cost-of-living impact for Portuguese households — no change from prior cycle.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns injuring 17 during Cártama tapas festival (Spain)
top_events.summary: Minor incident at a festival in neighboring Spain; no significant impact on Portugal's tourism economy or residents.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI tools suspended over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: US restrictions on leading AI models have minor indirect relevance to Portuguese tech sector and businesses, but no direct policy impact.
